overview.description: The MC Trio Equity Buffered ETF (TRIO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund actively manages a portfolio of FLEX options to gain exposure to US and international developed market equity securities, while aiming to buffer the first 10% of losses. The fund-of-funds seeks capital appreciation with limited downside protection. TRIO was launched on Mar 6, 2025 and is issued by MC.
